requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — INNOQ NM/IEC Conformity and Project Specifications
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——INNOQ NM/IEC合格评定及项目规格
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——INNOQ NM/IEC合格評定及項目規格

summary.en: Mozambique's standards body is INNOQ, the Instituto Nacional de Normalização e Qualidade. INNOQ administers Mozambican standards (NM) and can adopt or reference IEC standards for electrical products and conformity/import certification. For PV inverters, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the normal safety benchmark requested in donor-financed, IPP, mini-grid, C&I, mining, and gas-sector solar procurement specifications. Where a product is imported or supplied into a regulated project, exporters should treat INNOQ conformity/import certification, project-owner specifications, and lender technical requirements as separate gates from the factory's China domestic certification.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克标准机构为INNOQ（Instituto Nacional de Normalização e Qualidade）。INNOQ管理莫桑比克标准（NM），并可对电气产品及合格评定/进口认证采纳或引用IEC标准。对光伏逆变器而言，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2通常是捐助方融资、IPP、微电网、工商业、矿业和天然气领域太阳能采购规格中要求的安全基准。产品进口或供应至受监管项目时，出口商应将INNOQ合格评定/进口认证、项目业主规格和贷款方技术要求视为独立于中国国内出厂认证的门槛。
summary.zht: 莫三比克標準機構為INNOQ（Instituto Nacional de Normalização e Qualidade）。INNOQ管理莫三比克標準（NM），並可對電氣產品及合格評定/進口認證採納或引用IEC標準。對光伏逆變器而言，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2通常是捐助方融資、IPP、微電網、工商業、礦業和天然氣領域太陽能採購規格中要求的安全基準。產品進口或供應至受監管項目時，出口商應將INNOQ合格評定/進口認證、項目業主規格和貸款方技術要求視為獨立於中國國內出廠認證的門檻。

standards_or_laws: NM standards administered by INNOQ, including adopted or referenced IEC standards where applicable
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Project-owner and lender technical specifications for Mozambique solar PV, mini-grid, mining, and gas-sector projects

summary.en: China PV inverter safety evidence commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 test or certification documents issued through Chinese domestic laboratories and certification bodies. These documents may be useful technical background, but they are not an INNOQ conformity decision, not an IEC 62109-1/-2 certificate, and not automatic acceptance for Mozambique project-owner or lender specifications.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全证据通常包括由中国国内实验室和认证机构出具的GB/T 37408-2021及NB/T 32004测试或认证文件。这些文件可作为有用的技术背景，但不等同于INNOQ合格评定决定，不等同于IEC 62109-1/-2证书，也不自动满足莫桑比克项目业主或贷款方规格。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全證據通常包括由中國國內實驗室和認證機構出具的GB/T 37408-2021及NB/T 32004測試或認證文件。這些文件可作為有用的技術背景，但不等同於INNOQ合格評定決定，不等同於IEC 62109-1/-2證書，也不自動滿足莫三比克項目業主或貸款方規格。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T or NB/T safety documents should not be submitted as a substitute for Mozambique-facing IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence without prior acceptance from INNOQ, the importer, the project owner, and any lender engineer. Exporters should prepare model-specific IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports or certificates, map them to the exact inverter model and firmware version, and confirm whether INNOQ conformity/import certification requires additional local documentation, Portuguese labeling, or inspection steps.
gap.zh: 在未事先获得INNOQ、进口商、项目业主及任何贷款方工程师接受前，中国GB/T或NB/T安全文件不应作为面向莫桑比克的IEC 62109-1/-2证据替代提交。出口商应准备特定型号的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告或证书，将其对应到准确的逆变器型号和固件版本，并确认INNOQ合格评定/进口认证是否要求额外本地文件、葡语标签或检验步骤。
gap.zht: 在未事先獲得INNOQ、進口商、項目業主及任何貸款方工程師接受前，中國GB/T或NB/T安全文件不應作為面向莫三比克的IEC 62109-1/-2證據替代提交。出口商應準備特定型號的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告或證書，將其對應到準確的逆變器型號和韌體版本，並確認INNOQ合格評定/進口認證是否要求額外本地文件、葡語標籤或檢驗步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Potentially mandatory through INNOQ conformity/import certification, project procurement specifications, and lender technical requirements; confirm the current NM/IEC adoption and product scope before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 evidence may support domestic China certification or procurement, but does not create automatic Mozambique market access

source.publisher: INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalização e Qualidade)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence as the practical baseline for Mozambique PV inverter supply, especially for INNOQ conformity/import review and financed projects. Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 evidence is not automatically accepted. Confirm model-specific IEC evidence, Portuguese documentation needs, and INNOQ import/conformity steps before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据视为莫桑比克光伏逆变器供应的实际基准，尤其适用于INNOQ合格评定/进口审核和融资项目。中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004证据不会被自动接受。请在出货前确认特定型号IEC证据、葡语文件需求及INNOQ进口/合格评定步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據視為莫三比克光伏逆變器供應的實際基準，尤其適用於INNOQ合格評定/進口審核和融資項目。中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004證據不會被自動接受。請在出貨前確認特定型號IEC證據、葡語文件需求及INNOQ進口/合格評定步驟。
